No Poverty.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus relates to poverty eradication or economic support for the poor.

Zero Hunger.reason: The course content does not include any topics related to food security, nutrition (beyond general health), agriculture, or sustainable food systems.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The entire course focuses on precision health, covering disease prevention, mental health, community care, and new drug development, directly aligning with multiple SDG 3 targets.
evidence: 疾病的產生與預防 (Disease generation and prevention)

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) and aims to cultivate interdisciplinary talents with skills for employment (Target 4.4).
evidence: 精準健康學分學程 (Precision Health credit program)
培養跨領域人才 (cultivate interdisciplinary talents)

Gender Equality.reason: No course content or objectives explicitly address gender-specific issues, discrimination, or empowerment.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: There is no evidence in the syllabus related to water quality, sanitation, hygiene, or water resource management.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: The course does not cover topics such as energy access, renewable energy, or energy efficiency.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The 'Precision health industry overview' unit directly relates to promoting economic productivity and innovation within a high-value sector (Target 8.2).
evidence: 精準健康產業概論 (Precision health industry overview)

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course extensively covers health technology, including AI, big data, new drug development, and medical devices, directly supporting scientific research and innovation (Target 9.5).
evidence: 健康科技: AI與大數據分析 (Health technology: AI and big data analysis)
健康科技: 新藥開發 (Health technology: New drug development)
健康科技: 醫療器材 (Health technology: Medical devices)

Reduced Inequalities.reason: Topics like 'Community care' and 'Social care support system' infer a link to broadening access to health services, thereby addressing health inequalities (Target 10.2).
evidence: 社會照護支持系統 (Social care support system)

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: While 'Community care' is mentioned, it focuses on health within communities, not on sustainable urbanization, housing, or infrastructure development.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No evidence in the syllabus pertains to resource efficiency, waste reduction, sustainable practices, or supply chain management.

Climate Action.reason: The course content does not include any discussion of climate change, climate-related hazards, or mitigation strategies.

Life Below Water.reason: There is no mention of marine ecosystems, ocean pollution, or sustainable use of marine resources in the syllabus.

Life on Land.reason: The course does not cover topics related to terrestrial ecosystems, biodiversity, deforestation, or land degradation.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The 'Policy and law' unit provides a minor but explicit link to building effective institutions and policies for health and well-being (Targets 16.6, 16.b).
evidence: 健康社會:政策與法律 (Health society: Policy and law)

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course's 'interdisciplinary' nature and 'team-teaching' approach embody knowledge-sharing partnerships to advance health goals (Target 17.16).
evidence: 跨領域精準健康學分學程 (Interdisciplinary precision health credit program)
主授和合授老師群 (group of main and co-teaching professors)
